field.label: Interface
field.help: Choose which interface this host is connected to.

field.label: MAC address
field.help: Enter a MAC address in the following format: xx:xx:xx:xx:xx:xx

field.label: UDP port
field.help: UDP port to send the magic packet to (1-65535). Defaults to 9.

field.label: Description
field.help: You may enter a description here for your reference (not parsed).
